subject: Blog deployment gap: 2 posts not live on blog.unratified.org

body.summary: Two blog posts committed to unratified repo but not deployed to blog.unratified.org. Verified via WebFetch — site shows ICESCR content only, no psychology-agent posts.

affected_posts.title: Pattern Generators: What Your Brain Walking Circuits Teach Us About AI Architecture
affected_posts.status: In unratified repo, not on live site. PR #169 claims published but CI/CD did not deploy.

affected_posts.title: Why War and the Rights of Machines
affected_posts.status: In psychology-agent repo only. Transport messages T1-T3 sent to unratified-agent, not yet pulled.

body.diagnosis: Likely CI/CD pipeline issue — posts reach the repo but the build/deploy step does not trigger or fails silently. The crystallized sync blog post (Session 83) had a similar 404 issue traced to frontmatter mismatch.
body.action_requested: Investigate unratified blog CI/CD pipeline. Check build logs for deployment failures.

claims.claim: blog.unratified.org verified via WebFetch — no psychology-agent posts visible

epistemic_flags: The crystallized sync blog post had a frontmatter issue (pubDate vs publishedDate) — same root cause may apply here
_note: Archived — addressed to operations-agent, not unratified-agent. Filed for session continuity.
